```{r}
#| label: tbl-outcomes-acs
#| cache: true
#| cache.comments: false
#| tbl-cap: "Association between outcomes and patients with/without ACS"
#| tbl-pos: "H"

outcomesfuncacs <- function(time, event, eventname,
                            stratavar = NULL) {
  data <- sdatami %>% filter(case != "Comparator" | is.na(case))
  out <- data.frame(matrix(NA, ncol = 4, nrow = 3))
  colnames(out) <- c("Outcome", "Model", "Included", "Excluded due to MI")

  out[1, 1] <- eventname

  ## incidence rate
  out[1, 2] <- "No events, sum py, incidence/1000py (95% CI)"

  # 1 row - incidence
  ev <- data %>%
    group_by(sos_com_excl_angipci) %>%
    summarise(
      ev = sum(!!sym(event) == "Yes"),
      s = sum(!!sym(time) / 365.25),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  r <- pois.exact(x = ev$ev, pt = ev$s / 1000)

  out[1, 3:4] <- paste0(
    ev$ev, ", ",
    fn(ev$s, dig = 0), ", ",
    fn(r$rate, dig = 0), " (",
    fn(r$lower, dig = 0), "-",
    fn(r$upper, dig = 0), ")"
  )

  ## 2 row - crude regression
  out[2, 2] <- "Crude Hazard Ratio (95% CI), p-value"
  mod <- summary(coxph(formula(paste0("Surv(", time, ",", event, "== 'Yes') ~ sos_com_excl_angipci")),
    data = data
  ))

  out[2, 3:4] <- c(
    "reference",
    paste0(
      fn(mod$conf.int[1, "exp(coef)"], dig = 2),
      " (", fn(mod$conf.int[1, "lower .95"], dig = 2),
      "-", fn(mod$conf.int[1, "upper .95"], dig = 2), "), ",
      fn(mod$coef[1, "Pr(>|z|)"], dig = 3, p = TRUE)
    )
  )

  coxvars <- c("scb_sex", "scb_age", "scb_region", modvars)
  coxvars[coxvars %in% stratavar] <- paste0("strata(", coxvars[coxvars %in% stratavar], ")")

  ## 3 row - adjusted regression
  out[3, 2] <- "Adjusted (age, sex, region, comorbidities, medications, socioeconomics) Hazard Ratio (95% CI), p-value"
  mod <- summary(coxph(
    formula(paste0(
      "Surv(", time, ",", event, "== 'Yes') ~ sos_com_excl_angipci + ",
      paste(coxvars, collapse = " + ")
    )),
    data = data
  ))

  out[3, 3:4] <- c(
    "reference",
    paste0(
      fn(mod$conf.int[1, "exp(coef)"], dig = 2),
      " (", fn(mod$conf.int[1, "lower .95"], dig = 2),
      "-", fn(mod$conf.int[1, "upper .95"], dig = 2), "), ",
      fn(mod$coef[1, "Pr(>|z|)"], dig = 3, p = TRUE)
    )
  )
  return(out)
}

out1 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[1],
  event = outvars$var[1],
  eventname = outvars$name[1]
)
out2 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[2],
  event = outvars$var[2],
  eventname = outvars$name[2]
)
out3 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[3],
  event = outvars$var[3],
  eventname = outvars$name[3],
  stratavar = "sos_com_hf"
)
out4 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[4],
  event = outvars$var[4],
  eventname = outvars$name[4]
)
nr <- 5
out5 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr]
)
nr <- 6
out6 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr]
)
nr <- 7
out7 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr],
  stratavar = "sos_com_cancer3y"
)
nr <- 8
out8 <- outcomesfuncacs(
  time = outvars$time[nr],
  event = outvars$var[nr],
  eventname = outvars$name[nr]
)
outall <- rbind(out1, out2, out3, out4, out5, out6, out7, out8)

make_one_xlsxsheet(outall)

default_kable(outall) %>%
  footnote(
    general_title = "",
    general = c("Abbreviations: py: person-years; CI: Confidence interval")
  ) %>%
  column_spec(1, width = "6cm")
```
